name.ja: <ruby>水<rt>すい</rt></ruby><ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>術<rt>じゅつ</rt></ruby><ruby>師<rt>し</rt></ruby>エリア

requirement.en: During your Main Phase that you Normal or Special Summoned this card, send 1 monster from your hand or field to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Place 1 monster from your opponent's Graveyard on the top of the Deck. Then, your opponent cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters with the same original name as that monster face-up until the end of your opponent's next turn. This turn, you cannot activate the effect of "Eria the Water Spiritualist".
